name: @borjie/legibility
description: Org Legibility (Wave M6) — live, queryable, brand-locked map of the entire tenant. People × roles × scopes × capabilities × current work. Event-driven deltas + 5-min reconciliation. Public + internal views; juniors are never exposed on the public surface. Backed by migration 0037 (legibility_snapshots + legibility_deltas). See Docs/DESIGN/ORG_LEGIBILITY_SPEC.md §14-21.
